creator: einar@isnic.is
text:
I'm having the same problem, it's caused by rubygem-puma being updated to 6.5.0.

The gemspec for oxidized-web has:

s.add_runtime_dependency(%q<puma>.freeze, [">= 3.11.4".freeze, "< 6.5.0".freeze])

I think we should add a patch to set all dependencies to '>=' and face the fallout if updates break oxidized-web. We cannot trust upstream to update the dependencies fast enough
